name: Pharmaceutical Industry Report

glossary.GLP-1: glucagon-like peptide-1 receptor agonists used primarily in type 2 diabetes and weight management
glossary.IRA: Inflation Reduction Act (US drug pricing legislation)
glossary.FDA: United States Food and Drug Administration
glossary.biosimilar: a biologic medical product highly similar to an already-approved reference biologic
glossary.patent cliff: the expected sharp revenue decline when a blockbuster drug loses patent protection

format_rules: All monetary figures use USD with a $ prefix and the units suffix (e.g. $1.48T).
